opening_hours_closed_times_check.name: opening_hours_closed_times_check
opening_hours_closed_times_check.value: ("opening_hours"."is_closed" = true AND "opening_hours"."open_time" IS NULL AND "opening_hours"."close_time" IS NULL) OR ("opening_hours"."is_closed" = false AND "opening_hours"."open_time" IS NOT NULL AND "opening_hours"."close_time" IS NOT NULL)
